policy: No remote cover hotlinks. Project Gutenberg covers are copied into local assets with provenance. Fahasa automation is not used when blocked by anti-bot challenge; direct reviewed image URLs can be added in a later manifest pass.

unmappedWorks.reason: No matching public-domain Project Gutenberg cover is mapped for this work.
